caption: This is the biggest hybrid mahseer I've ever seen. These guys have populated a lot of our rivers in the Western Ghats, which should be holding our native Mahseers species like the Humpback Mahseers and Malabar Mahseers. Mahseers are excellent hunters. They stay in small to large shoals at the edge of rapidly flowing water, where they pick out smaller fish that come down river from the rapids. The introduction of the hybrid Mahseers has put our native Mahseers in competition for food and habitat.  #fishing #fish #mahseerfishing #india #snakeheadfishing #mahseer #angling #fishinglife #lovefishing #topwaterfishing #topwater #games #outdoors #trip #2022 #newyear #anger #rod #daiwa #shimano #trav

caption: Fishing for large Mahseer fish in Kalimantan is very different from fishing for Mahseer in India. In Indonesia, if you can catch a Mahseer fish weighing more than 10 kg, it is considered a success for a freshwater fish angler. Large Mahseer fish do not move as fast as small and medium Mahseer fish and their position is often at the bottom of the river.  Let's protect and preserve the habitat of native Putussibau fish.
